summary: Completed comprehensive testing of restaurant POS system with all 4 modules (Captain, Kitchen, Billing, Admin). All core features working correctly including real-time order flow, bill generation, and table management.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: All 16 backend API endpoints working correctly
Home page role selection with 4 cards
Captain App - menu browsing, cart management, order placement
Kitchen Display - real-time order viewing, status updates
Billing Dashboard - bill generation, payment processing, order history
Admin Panel - table and menu management
Real-time order flow: Captain → Kitchen → Billing → Payment
Order status progression (pending → preparing → ready → completed)
